title: [ExportVerilog] Type scope emission in split outputs mode

features.name: type alias declaration in type scope
features.description: Code should include a type alias declaration referencing a type within a type scope, used as a module port type

features.name: multiple type scopes with same-named type declarations
features.description: Code should include multiple type scopes each containing a type declaration with the same base name, where modules use types from different scopes
